description: PHASE 8: Notifications & Automation - Backend notification service (email via Resend, Web Push via VAPID), cron jobs (APScheduler), and frontend notification UI with PWA push. Covers TASK-019 and TASK-020.
steps: Create backend/app/services/notification_service.py with send_notification(recipient_id, type, title, body, data, channels) that saves to DB and dispatches to email/push channels
Create backend/app/services/email_service.py with Resend integration and HTML templates for: invoice_sent, payment_reminder, payment_overdue, contract_expiring, maintenance_update, task_assigned
Create backend/app/services/push_service.py with VAPID Web Push: send_push(endpoint, p256dh, auth_key, title, body, data), send_push_to_user(profile_id, title, body, data)
Create backend/app/routers/notifications.py with: GET /notifications (last 50 for user), PATCH /notifications/mark-read (body: {ids} or {all: true})
Create backend/app/cron/scheduler.py with APScheduler setup, start in FastAPI lifespan event

Create backend/app/cron/jobs.py with all job functions: spawn_recurring_tasks (daily 5AM), auto_generate_invoices (1st monthly 6AM), send_monthly_invoices (3rd monthly 8AM), payment_reminder (daily 8AM, 3 days before due), overdue_check (daily 9AM, 5 and 10 days overdue), contract_expiry_check (daily 8AM, 30 and 7 days), expire_contracts (daily midnight)
Integrate notification calls into existing services: task_service (on assign), maintenance_service (on resolve), contract_service (on activate/terminate), invoice_service (on send)
Register notification and push routers in main.py, start scheduler in lifespan
Create frontend/src/hooks/usePushNotification.ts with requestPermission, isSupported, permissionStatus
Create frontend/src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx with bell icon + unread count badge, polling every 30s
Create frontend/src/components/layout/NotificationDropdown.tsx with recent 10 notifications, read/unread styling, mark all read, navigate on click
Create frontend/src/pages/notifications/NotificationPage.tsx full list grouped by day
Create frontend/src/services/pwa.ts for service worker registration
Create frontend/public/sw.js with: app shell caching (Cache First), API network-first with cache fallback, push event handler, notification click handler
Add push permission banner to AppLayout (shown after login, dismissible)
acceptance_criteria: Notification service saves to DB and dispatches to configured channels
APScheduler jobs are registered with correct cron expressions
Push service uses VAPID for web push delivery
NotificationBell polls and shows unread count
Service worker handles push events and notification clicks
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.routers.notifications import router; from app.routers.push import router as pr; from app.cron.scheduler import scheduler; print('OK')"
